feature.name: Username and Password Login
feature.description:
As an existing customer
  I want to log in using my username and password
  So that I can access my account securely from any device

ui: string message.empty_fields "Please enter both username and password."
string message.invalid_credentials "Invalid username or password. Please try again."
string message.account_locked "Your account has been locked due to multiple failed login attempts. Please contact customer support to unlock your account."
string message.quick_login_expired "Quick Login Expired. For your security, please sign in again with your email and password."
assumptions: The user is an existing customer with pre-registered credentials
Failed login attempts are tracked server-side by username
Account lockout duration is 30 minutes server-side
Account suspension occurs after 3 consecutive lockout cycles requiring Contact Centre intervention
Quick Login is a biometric/cached credential feature independent of this flow
Network errors during authentication do not count as failed login attempts
Client-side validation is performed before API calls for empty fields
The app uses token-based session management with expiry detection

scenarios.name: Successful login navigates to home screen

steps.text: I enter a valid username
I enter the correct password
I tap 'Sign in'
an inline 'Login successful!' message is shown
I am automatically navigated to the app home screen within approximately 1 second
the failed attempt counter for my username is cleared

assumptions: Auto-navigation to home screen occurs within approximately 1 second
Failed attempt counter is cleared on successful login server-side

scenarios.name: Migrated user logs in with non-email username

steps.text: I enter my existing The Bank username in non-email format
I enter the correct password
I tap 'Sign in'
authentication succeeds
I am navigated to the home screen

assumptions: The Bank supports legacy non-email username format for migrated users

steps.text: I enter valid credentials and tap 'Sign in'
the button label changes to 'Signing in...'
the button is disabled to prevent duplicate submissions
a loading state is shown while authentication is in progress

assumptions: Button is disabled during authentication to prevent duplicate submissions
Loading state is shown while the API call is in progress

steps.text: I tap 'Sign in' with either field empty
I see: 'Please enter both username and password.'
the button returns to its active state

ui: string message.empty_fields "Please enter both username and password."
assumptions: Validation is performed client-side without API call
Button returns to active state after showing validation error

scenarios.name: Invalid credentials show error without disclosing attempt count

steps.text: I enter an incorrect username and password combination
I tap 'Sign in'
I see: 'Invalid username or password. Please try again.'
no information about remaining attempts is shown to the user

ui: string message.invalid_credentials "Invalid username or password. Please try again."
assumptions: Error message does not disclose which field is incorrect
Error message does not disclose remaining attempt count
Invalid credentials are counted as failed attempts server-side

scenarios.name: Account locked after 3 consecutive failed attempts

steps.text: I have failed login 2 times with this username
I enter incorrect credentials and tap 'Sign in' again
I see: 'Your account has been locked due to multiple failed login attempts. Please contact customer support to unlock your account.'
the account is locked for 30 minutes server-side

ui: string message.account_locked "Your account has been locked due to multiple failed login attempts. Please contact customer support to unlock your account."
assumptions: Lockout threshold is 3 consecutive failed attempts
Lockout duration is 30 minutes enforced server-side

scenarios.name: Account suspended after 3 consecutive lockout cycles

steps.text: my account has been locked 3 times consecutively
I attempt to log in again after the lockout period
my account is suspended
I must contact the Contact Centre for manual re-enablement

assumptions: Suspension threshold is 3 consecutive lockout cycles
Manual Contact Centre intervention is required for re-enablement
Suspension is enforced server-side and persists beyond lockout duration

scenarios.name: Network error during authentication allows retry

steps.text: a network error occurs during authentication
an error message is shown
I can retry by tapping 'Sign in' again

assumptions: Network errors do not count toward failed login attempts
User can retry authentication without page reload or re-entering credentials

scenarios.name: Session expires while login flow is active

steps.text: my session times out while I am on the login screen
I am redirected to the login screen
any unsaved progress is lost

assumptions: Session timeout detection exists on the login screen
No form data is persisted across session boundaries
User is redirected to the login screen upon session expiry

scenarios.name: Quick login expired banner shown when arriving from expired session

steps.text: I arrived at this screen from a 'Quick Login Expired' state
an amber banner is shown: 'Quick Login Expired. For your security, please sign in again with your email and password.'

ui: string message.quick_login_expired "Quick Login Expired. For your security, please sign in again with your email and password."
assumptions: Quick Login is a biometric/cached credential feature that expires independently
The amber banner is informational and does not block standard login flow

scenarios.name: Biometric shortcut preserves partially entered form data

steps.text: I have partially entered my username
I tap the biometric login shortcut button
the biometric flow is initiated
the partially entered form data is preserved if I return

assumptions: Biometric login shortcut is available without completing the form
Partially entered form data is preserved in memory when switching to biometric flow
User can return to the login form with previously entered data intact

steps.text: authentication succeeds
the transition from login screen to home screen is direct
no separate full-screen success page is shown

assumptions: Design intentionally omits an intermediary success page
Transition is direct from login to home screen without intermediate screens

scenarios.name: Rapid screen taps during success state do not cause duplicate navigation

steps.text: the 'Login successful!' message is shown
I rapidly tap the screen multiple times
no duplicate navigation events are triggered

assumptions: Navigation events are debounced or throttled client-side
Duplicate navigation attempts are prevented during the success state transition

scenarios.name: Password field is always masked — no show/hide toggle

steps.text: I am on the login screen
the password field is masked at all times
no show/hide toggle is shown

assumptions: Password masking is enforced visually and in the DOM
No password visibility toggle is available for security compliance
The banking application requires mandatory password masking

steps.text: I am on the username and password login screen
both the username and password fields are empty

assumptions: All error messages are user-facing and localized
The login screen preserves form state only within the same session
Button states (active/loading/disabled) reflect authentication status
The app has a biometric login feature accessible from this screen
